meaning: adj.活泼的,活跃的,栩栩如生的,真实的
examples: She's very lively and full of fun.
She had a sweet, lively personality.
She had a lively and enquiring mind.
The popular chacarera, a lively partner dance, incorporates flashy zapateo (quick stomps of the feet).
Others in literature on the list include Booker Prize-winning author Penelope Lively, 78, who is made a dame.
